input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

recent_thinks: [0-2] Underwater footage shows a sandy seabed under turquoise water with dancing caustic light patterns. Blurry, dark shapes suggestive of fish move slowly in the distance. [2-4] A dark, elongated fish shape swims clearly from the center towards the left, becoming more distinct against the sandy bottom. The turquoise water remains murky, with sunlight creating dancing caustic patterns on the seabed. The camera pans slightly left, following the fish's slow progression through the calm underwater scene.

[4-6] The dark, elongated fish shape continues swimming slowly toward the left, passing over the sandy bottom. A large, rocky formation emerges on the left edge of the frame, distinct from the surrounding sand. Sunlight filters through the turquoise water, casting dancing caustic patterns on the seabed and the new rocky structure.

[6-8] The dark, elongated fish shape continues swimming slowly towards the bottom left corner, appearing as a thin silhouette against the sand. The rocky formation previously visible on the left edge disappears from the frame. Sunlight continues to cast dancing caustic patterns across the murky, turquoise water and sandy seabed.

samples.output: <think>A long, slender, dark fish silhouette swims horizontally near the sandy bottom. The rocky formation remains absent from the left side. Sunlight continues to create shifting caustic patterns on the pale seabed, illuminating the murky turquoise water as the fish moves slowly across the lower frame.</think><action>silent</action>

[22-26] The camera captures a bare torso underwater, dressed in bright yellow swim trunks with a black side panel. A light blue bracelet adorns the right wrist while hands manipulate the dark figure near the chest against the rippling sandy seabed and turquoise water.

[26-30] A swimmer wearing dark trunks with a white logo and blue fins propels themselves away across a sandy bottom, becoming a blurry silhouette in the distance. [30-34] The view shifts to a close-up of a person with a blue snorkel mask and tube surrounded by bubbles, gesturing with a hand near their head before the camera tilts up to the shimmering surface. [34-40] Another person wearing a black long-sleeved top and blue shorts with red and white stripes swims horizontally from left to right. Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text:
[0-4] Underwater footage shows a sandy seabed under turquoise water with dancing caustic light patterns. Blurry dark shapes move in the distance. A dark, elongated fish swims from center to left as the camera pans.
[4-8] The fish continues left over the sand. A rocky formation appears on the left edge then disappears. The fish becomes a thin silhouette moving toward the bottom left while sunlight casts shifting ripples on the murky floor.
[8-12] A long, slender dark fish silhouette swims horizontally near the pale bottom. Sunlight creates shifting caustic patterns. The fish moves slowly left across the lower frame. A blurry dark shape appears in the center-right area near the end.

[12-14] A distinct, dark, flat shape appears centrally on the sandy bottom, contrasting with the pale sand as sunlight casts dancing caustic patterns through the murky turquoise water. [14-18] A human arm and hand enter from the upper right, featuring light skin and a thick black wristband, extending into the water above the rippling seabed. [18-22] A person wearing a blue-rimmed snorkel mask and breathing tube is revealed holding a small, dark miniature humanoid figure with outstretched arms, presenting it directly to the camera. [22-26] The camera captures a bare torso underwater, dressed in bright yellow swim trunks with a black side panel. A light blue bracelet adorns the right wrist while hands manipulate the dark figure near the chest against the rippling sandy seabed and turquoise water.

[26-30] A swimmer wearing dark trunks with a white logo and blue fins propels themselves away across a sandy bottom, becoming a blurry silhouette in the distance. [30-34] The view shifts to a close-up of a person with a blue snorkel mask and tube surrounded by bubbles, gesturing with a hand near their head before the camera tilts up to the shimmering surface. [34-40] Another person wearing a black long-sleeved top and blue shorts with red and white stripes swims horizontally from left to right. They turn to face the camera, giving a double thumbs-up gesture, then transition to extending both arms forward with open palms while swimming near a green, rocky seabed.

[40-42] The swimmer in the black shirt is no longer visible. Instead, a close-up shows a person wearing a snorkel mask surrounded by bubbles, while a limb in dark shorts with white stripes enters from the left against a green background. [42-44] The camera tilts upward past a dark, pointed object near the surface, shifting to the shimmering water interface where bright sunlight filters through rising bubbles. [44-46] Breaking the surface reveals a clear blue sky with bright sun and a distant coastline featuring numerous tall white buildings and hotels along the shore. [46-54] Above water, a man with wet curly hair is in the foreground. Behind him, a shirtless man in dark shorts with a neon yellow waistband stands in shallow water, while another person floats face-down nearby. The camera pans left away from the standing man, focusing on jagged rocky formations in the shallow foreground and the calm turquoise sea stretching toward the city skyline on the horizon.

[54-66] A person with dark hair floats on their back in shallow, murky water near the shore, with tall white buildings lining the distant coast under a clear blue sky. The individual turns their head to face the camera directly and raises their right hand slightly above the surface. Later, they lower their legs from a vertical position into the water, creating a splash, before their body settles horizontally again. [66-68] The camera pans right, revealing large, dark, jagged rocks emerging from the water in the foreground on the right side, while the city skyline remains visible in the distance. [68-70] The scene shifts to a close-up selfie of a person with wet, dark curly hair and bare shoulders standing on a sandy shore with green bushes and trees in the background under a bright blue sky.

recent_thinks: [70-72] The camera captures a close-up of a person with wet, dark curly hair. In the background, a shirtless individual wearing dark shorts with a neon yellow waistband walks across the sandy, rocky terrain. Green bushes and trees are visible along the shore under a bright sky, with another figure standing near the vegetation.

[72-74] A shirtless individual wearing dark shorts with a neon yellow waistband walks left across the rocky, sandy shore. Another figure stands near green bushes in the background. The camera angle shifts, showing more of the uneven, rocky ground and vegetation as the close-up face moves toward the right edge of the frame.

[74-76] Two shirtless individuals walk along a sandy, rocky path near the shoreline. One wears dark shorts with a bright neon yellow waistband. They move leftward past green bushes on the right, with the sea and distant city skyline visible in the background under a bright sky.

[76-78] The two shirtless figures proceed further left along the sandy path. The individual with the neon yellow waistband walks ahead near the green bushes. The camera pans to follow them, revealing more of the rocky terrain and the ocean horizon under the bright sky.

[78-80] The camera view shifts to a close-up of a person's head with dark hair on the right edge, facing left towards green bushes. The sandy shore and ocean horizon remain in the background, while the previously visible walking figures are no longer in the central frame.

Green bushes sway in the lower right, with a partial glimpse of dark hair on the extreme right edge. The ocean horizon remains visible in the background behind the vegetation.</think><action>silent</action>

[4-8] The fish continues left over the sand. A rocky formation appears on the left edge then disappears. The fish becomes a thin silhouette moving toward the bottom left while sunlight casts shifting ripples on the murky floor.
[8-12] A long, slender dark fish silhouette swims horizontally near the pale bottom. Sunlight creates shifting caustic patterns. The fish moves slowly left across the lower frame. A blurry dark shape appears in the center-right area near the end.

[12-14] A distinct, dark, flat shape appears centrally on the sandy bottom, contrasting with the pale sand as sunlight casts dancing caustic patterns through the murky turquoise water. [14-18] A human arm and hand enter from the upper right, featuring light skin and a thick black wristband, extending into the water above the rippling seabed. [18-22] A person wearing a blue-rimmed snorkel mask and breathing tube is revealed holding a small, dark miniature humanoid figure with outstretched arms, presenting it directly to the camera. [22-26] The camera captures a bare torso underwater, dressed in bright yellow swim trunks with a black side panel. A light blue bracelet adorns the right wrist while hands manipulate the dark figure near the chest against the rippling sandy seabed and turquoise water.

recent_thinks: [26-28] The camera cuts to a wider shot of a person swimming away underwater. This individual wears dark swim trunks with a white logo on the leg, a snorkel mask, and blue fins. The previous close-up of a torso in yellow trunks is no longer visible as the swimmer moves across the sandy seabed.

[28-30] The swimmer propels themselves further away from the viewpoint, becoming a smaller, blurrier silhouette against the sandy bottom. Their blue fins continue to kick rhythmically as they navigate the murky turquoise water, moving deeper into the distance while the sunlight ripples across the seabed below.

samples.output: <think>The scene abruptly changes to a close-up of a person underwater wearing a blue snorkel mask and tube. Bubbles float around their face. Their hand is raised near their head with fingers extended in a gesture. The background shows turquoise water and a sandy seabed.</think><action>silent</action>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-4] Underwater footage shows a sandy seabed under turquoise water with dancing caustic light patterns. Blurry dark shapes move in the distance. A dark, elongated fish swims from center to left as the camera pans. [4-8] The fish continues left over the sand. A rocky formation appears on the left edge then disappears. The fish becomes a thin silhouette moving toward the bottom left while sunlight casts shifting ripples on the murky floor. [8-12] A long, slender dark fish silhouette swims horizontally near the pale bottom. Sunlight creates shifting caustic patterns. The fish moves slowly left across the lower frame. A blurry dark shape appears in the center-right area near the end. [12-14] A distinct, dark, flat shape appears centrally on the sandy bottom, contrasting with the pale sand as sunlight casts dancing caustic patterns through the murky turquoise water. [14-18] A human arm and hand enter from the upper right, featuring light skin and a thick black wristband, extending into the water above the rippling seabed. [18-22] A person wearing a blue-rimmed snorkel mask and breathing tube is revealed holding a small, dark miniature humanoid figure with outstretched arms, presenting it directly to the camera. [22-26] The camera captures

[26-30] A swimmer wearing dark trunks with a white logo and blue fins propels themselves away across a sandy bottom, becoming a blurry silhouette in the distance. [30-34] The view shifts to a close-up of a person with a blue snorkel mask and tube surrounded by bubbles, gesturing with a hand near their head before the camera tilts up to the shimmering surface. [34-40] Another person wearing a black long-sleeved top and blue shorts with red and white stripes swims horizontally from left to right. They turn to face the camera, giving a double thumbs-up gesture, then transition to extending both arms forward with open palms while swimming near a green, rocky seabed.

[40-42] The swimmer in the black shirt is no longer visible. Instead, a close-up shows a person wearing a snorkel mask surrounded by bubbles, while a limb in dark shorts with white stripes enters from the left against a green background. [42-44] The camera tilts upward past a dark, pointed object near the surface, shifting to the shimmering water interface where bright sunlight filters through rising bubbles. [44-46] Breaking the surface reveals a clear blue sky with bright sun and a distant coastline featuring numerous tall white buildings and hotels along the shore. [46-54] Above water, a man with wet curly hair is in the foreground. Behind him, a shirtless man in dark shorts with a neon yellow waistband stands in shallow water, while another person floats face-down nearby. The camera pans left away from the standing man, focusing on jagged rocky formations in the shallow foreground and the calm turquoise sea stretching toward the city skyline on the horizon.

[54-66] A person with dark hair floats on their back in shallow, murky water near the shore, with tall white buildings lining the distant coast under a clear blue sky. The individual turns their head to face the camera directly and raises their right hand slightly above the surface. Later, they lower their legs from a vertical position into the water, creating a splash, before their body settles horizontally again. [66-68] The camera pans right, revealing large, dark, jagged rocks emerging from the water in the foreground on the right side, while the city skyline remains visible in the distance. [68-70] The scene shifts to a close-up selfie of a person with wet, dark curly hair and bare shoulders standing on a sandy shore with green bushes and trees in the background under a bright blue sky.

[70-74] A close-up features a person with wet, dark curly hair while a shirtless individual in dark shorts with a neon yellow waistband walks left across the rocky, sandy shore near green bushes. [74-78] Two shirtless figures, one wearing the neon-waistband shorts, proceed leftward along the path with the sea and distant city skyline visible behind them. [78-82] The camera shifts to show the dark-haired person's head on the right edge before tilting up toward the bright sky, removing the walking figures from view. [82-84] The person exits the frame entirely, leaving a view of green bushes framing the teal ocean horizon and sandy terrain under a clear blue sky.

recent_thinks: [84-86] The camera submerges from the sandy shore lined with green bushes into the ocean. The view transitions abruptly to an underwater scene, revealing a rocky seabed covered in light-colored coral formations. The water appears murky green-blue, highlighting the textured ocean floor and submerged rocks.

samples.output: <think>The underwater perspective persists, shifting focus toward the seabed where a large, bumpy, light-colored coral formation becomes prominent.
